title: AMC Entertainment Launching New Live Concert Experience With Arena One
text: Arena One and AMC Theatres announced the launch of Arena One at AMC, a new live concert format that brings fans together nationwide for a single, interactive, real-time concert event. Debuting in June 2026, this groundbreaking concert concept is set to feature performances from Bebe Rexha on June 17, Paris Hilton on June 18, Kim Petras on June 19, and Maren Morris on June 20, all experienced live in more than 300 AMC locations nationwide. The innovative platform transforms select cinemas into one interactive, real-time concert venue, where audiences of 150,000+ gather in AMCs across 200+ locations to experience shows together. Fans at AMC locations around the U.S. are part of the live event, with crowd buzz, sound, and reactions flowing back and forth between the fans and performers in real time through innovative interactive technology. Inside each auditorium, the atmosphere is designed to feel immediate and electric, featuring powerful sound, massive screens, and a room full of energy that comes from audiences across the country connecting and sharing the moment together. Tickets will range from $40 to $75 depending on the artist and market. This partnership represents a diversification of AMC's revenue streams beyond traditional movie exhibition.
